creator: scratch65535@messagebox.email
text:
When I installed xfce4, I appeared to get samba44 for free.  But it had given me problems when I was trying to get 11.1 going, so when I reverted to 10.3, I decided to replace it with the 46 package.  

Unfortunately, the price of replacing 44 with 46 would have been the complete de-installation of xfce4!  So I didn't do it, and don't know whether the problem preventing samba-tool from working in 44 also affects 46.  

As far as I'm aware, there is no necessary connection between any release of samba and the xfce4 subsystem, so pkg should not care about whether 44 (or any version) gets replaced.
